response.justification: The candidate does not meet the core mandatory requirements for this role. Their professional C++ experience is limited to a single, brief role nearly a decade ago, falling far short of the 5-10 years required. Furthermore, they lack any experience in the specified financial domains like capital markets or fixed income, and their development background is not on the Windows platform. While a senior engineer, their expertise in web technologies (Node.js, TypeScript) and Dlang is a complete mismatch for this C++ / Windows / Finance position.
strengths: Extensive overall experience as a senior software engineer.
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through public speaking and workshops.
Strong background in modern development practices like CI/CD and TDD.
concerns: Virtually no recent or substantial C++ development experience.
Lacks the required domain knowledge in capital markets or fixed income.
No significant experience developing on the Windows platform as required.
